26 January, 2026, English Proficiency Exam (DÜİYES)

Foreign Languages Unit English Preparatory Program 2025-2026 Academic Year Fall Semester DÜİYES Procedures and Principles

Dear Students,

The 2025-2026 Fall Semester English Proficiency Exam (DÜİYES) will be administered on Monday,26 January, and invigilated face-to-face on Dudullu Campus. The exam consists of two sessions, and students must attend both sessions.

· The students are to be present in the class where they will take the exam at 09.30 so that the invigilators can check the students’ ID cards on time.

· Students must have a valid ID with a photo (student ID card, passport, driver's license) during the exam. You have to present a valid ID to be admitted to the exam.

· The students need to bring a blue pen, a pencil and an eraser.

· DÜİYES results will be announced on January 30th.
